problem id: e75dfe6b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11100100 -> 10111001
  00010010 -> 01000100
  10001001 -> 00000010
  11010100 -> 10110101
  00001111 -> 11100011
  01111011 -> 01111110
  01111110 -> 11011111
  10001100 -> 10100011
  10111101 -> 10001111
  01110110 -> 11011101

query: 10011000
predicted answer: 00100110
